title: Magnetic resonance imaging apparatus and imaging management method
abstract: According to one embodiment, a magnetic resonance imaging apparatus includes processing circuitry. The processing circuitry is configured to calculate an allowable amount of heat input to a superconducting magnet, the allowable amount being allocated to each of a plurality of imagings scheduled during a target period. The processing circuitry is configured to determine an imaging condition based on the allowable amount in the each of the plurality of imagings.
claims: 1. A magnetic resonance imaging apparatus, comprising: processing circuitry configured to: acquire imaging information including information of a plurality of imagings scheduled during a target period; and determine an imaging condition for each of the plurality of imagings included in the imaging information based on an allowable amount of heat input to a superconducting magnet in the target period.
